review_comment: Shall the `TestWeightString` be moved to here too? it seems that https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/29283 happens on `TestWeightString` (Also I have encountered  few failures on this function)
Nope. The root cause of `TestWeightString` is running concurrently with `TestCIWeightString`. Thus after we move `TestCIWeightString` out, `TestWeightString` will be fixed.
